== Notes for [[Item:Q57901|Q57901]] ==

"'''México matrimonios, 1570-1950'''," database, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:JHPD-F5D : 14 July 2015), Francisco Alfonso Sosa in entry for Juan De Orduna and Leonor De Sosa Y Abendano, 09 Jan 1633; citing Asuncion, Mexico, Distrito Federal, Mexico, reference 2:2BKSM2H; FHL microfilm 35,267. ... Name: Juan De Orduna; Spouse's Name: '''Leonor De Sosa Y Abendano'''; Event Date: '''09 Jan 1633'''; Event Place: '''Asuncion, Mexico, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Father's Name: Diego Sanches De Orduna; Mother's Name: Maria Pinto; Spouse's Father's Name: Francisco Alfonso Sosa; Spouse's Mother's Name:Luisa De Ruis Y Avendano

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADC9FB301EFBBFA9822EF79916C7886
geni:6000000068140555977

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
